title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JSW Steel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JSW Steel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
